title: Suspicious Process Creation Detection
description: Detects suspicious process creation events including execution of reconnaissance tools and living-off-the-land binaries.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT QIDNAME(qid) as EventName, sourceIP, destinationIP, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) as LogSource, payload, starttime FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%execve%' AND (payload ILIKE '%/bin/bash%' OR payload ILIKE '%/bin/sh%' OR payload ILIKE '%wget%' OR payload ILIKE '%curl%' OR payload ILIKE '%python%')) ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 300 SECONDS
